use_cases: Displaying audiobook content with cover art, metadata, and reading progress in media streaming platforms
Showing book collection items with author, genre, and completion percentage in e-commerce or library apps
Tracking reading progress with visual progress bar and remaining pages calculation
Creating interactive audiobook library cards with category filtering and year information
Building personalized reading dashboard widgets with progress visualization and cover display
ai_summary: A glassmorphic audiobook card component displaying book cover, title, author, category, and publication year with a visual progress bar showing pages read versus total pages. Features gradient backgrounds with backdrop blur and semi-transparent borders for a modern, layered aesthetic. Includes progress percentage calculation and pages remaining display for reading tracking applications.
